plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because the cached selector for 'Last Name' could not be found. The failure screenshot reveals the form has changed (displaying 'Set 2' fields like 'Your Name' and 'Contact Email' instead), indicating a stale cache or a dynamic UI.
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows a different form ('Set 2') than what the cached 'Last Name' selector expected
The 'overallObjective' is semantically flexible and can adapt to UI changes if re-run autonomously
Prior history shows alternating success/failure, suggesting a dynamic or unstable environment

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu page.ai cache and retry the test. This will allow the autonomous agent to generate a new set of instructions that match the current UI state ('Set 2').

remediationSteps.summary: Handle dynamic question sets in test logic
remediationSteps.details: If the UI frequently alternates between question sets, consider running this test in a non-deterministic mode or adding logic to handle both variants.

plan.notes: The UI appears to switch between different question sets (indicated by the 'Set 2' badge). Since the overallObjective 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible, clearing the cache and retrying will allow the agent to adapt to the current UI state.
